news.summary: LG Ad Solutions, a top player in connected TV and cross-screen advertising, has unveiled a fresh partnership with Amazon Publisher Services (APS) in Mountain View, Calif. This integration allows advertisers to tap into increased advertising options on LG Channels, the free streaming service on all LG Smart TVs. The collaboration with Amazon Publisher Direct on Amazon DSP offers marketers a chance to access extended ad inventory. The popularity of programmatic advertising on Connected TV (CTV) is evident, with investments reaching almost $25 billion in the industry.
news.headline: LG Ad Solutions partners with Amazon Publisher Services to offer programmatic ad buys on LG Channels via Amazon DSP, highlighting huge growth in CTV ad spend nearing $25B.

news.summary: A new software security company, Spektion, has recently emerged from stealth in Austin, Texas. The company aims to address the issue of ineffective vulnerability management with a purpose-built solution. By leveraging insights during runtime, Spektion seeks to break the cycle of vulnerabilities. The exact number of vulnerabilities addressed or the specific runtime insights utilized by Spektion are not disclosed in the provided information.
news.headline: Spektion emerges with $5M funding for advanced vulnerability management solution, targeting software security.

news.summary: KlariVis, a prominent banking data analytics company based in Roanoke, Virginia, was recognized as one of the 2025 Best Places to Work in Virginia by Virginia Business and Best Companies Group. This prestigious acknowledgment is based on an employee survey evaluating key factors such as leadership, corporate culture, role satisfaction, work environment, supervisor relationships, training, benefits, pay, and overall engagement. The company's achievement highlights its commitment to creating a positive workplace environment for its employees.
news.headline: KlariVis named in 2025 Best Places to Work in Virginia list based on employee survey results of key core values.

news.summary: Phoenix-based Bubbies Ice Cream, the leading mochi ice cream brand in the natural channel, is enhancing its sustainability efforts by introducing certified home-compostable packaging. The company is swapping out its internal clamshell packaging for new paper pulp trays to reduce plastic waste. This eco-friendly packaging change will lead to the elimination of around 310 tons of plastic. The switch is timely, coinciding with Earth Month in April, showcasing Bubbies' commitment to environmental responsibility.
news.headline: Bubbies Ice Cream introduces home-compostable packaging for Earth Month, eliminating 310 tons of plastic waste.

news.summary: Cloudinary, based in San Jose, California, has introduced Cloudinary Video as a separate API-focused video solution. The new offering includes innovative features to assist brands in adhering to essential accessibility standards like WCAG 2.1 AA. Additionally, this update enables brands to efficiently provide localized and live streaming video content on a large scale. Cloudinary has also made improvements to facilitate the integration of Video into different platforms for technical teams.
news.headline: Cloudinary introduces new video innovations to meet accessibility standards, offer localized, live streaming experiences.
Trump: We are waiting for China's call.
Trump: I spoke about US LNG with South Korea's acting president.
Trump: China also wants to make a deal, badly.

news.summary: A software company based in San Diego, Wrike, has recently integrated Klaxoon, a visual collaboration suite, into its work management platform only 70 days after acquiring it. This integration combines advanced whiteboarding features, interactive workshops, workflow execution, and project management within Wrike's AI-powered system. This move aims to enhance team productivity and collaboration by offering a unified experience.
news.headline: Wrike integrates Klaxoon into its platform 70 days after acquisition, offering advanced whiteboarding and project management.
Trump: Things are looking good on South Korea.

news.summary: ELMA, N.Y.-- Elmhurst® 1925, a top producer of plant-based dairy alternatives, revealed that three of its best-selling items – Pistachio Barista Edition, Unsweetened Coconut Cashew Milk, and Maple Walnut Barista Edition – will be available in various Whole Foods Market stores nationwide. With a growing demand for products featuring simpler ingredients, as highlighted by 81% of shoppers emphasizing the importance of purchasing wholesome goods, these products have been introduced to cater to this trend.
news.headline: Elmhurst® 1925 expands Whole Foods Market distribution with three SKUs - Pistachio Barista Edition, Unsweetened Coconut Cashew Milk, and Maple Walnut Barista Edition. Consumers emphasize shorter ingredient lists.

news.summary: In Seattle, a prominent financial infrastructure and integration technology company, PortX, has disclosed a strategic partnership with Nasdaq Verafin, a top provider of financial crime management solutions. PortX specializes in offering open access to core services and promoting innovation for credit unions through its integration-platform-as-a-service (iPaaS) Fintech Hub. This partnership underscores PortX’s commitment to providing cutting-edge, integrated solutions for financial institutions.
news.headline: PortX partners with Nasdaq Verafin to enhance financial crime management for banks and credit unions. Mission to provide innovative solutions.

news.summary: A financial planning platform known as Domain Money has recently introduced an annual membership model in response to increasing demand for consistent financial advice. Alongside their existing one-time financial planning services, the company now offers three membership options - Essential, Strategic, and Comprehensive. These memberships include ongoing support, yearly plan updates, and personalized coaching. Domain Money, established in 2021, aims to enhance access to top-tier financial guidance.
news.headline: Domain Money introduces membership model with three tiers - Essential, Strategic, & Comprehensive - offers ongoing financial guidance. Founded in 2021.

news.summary: A company called Modern Wealth has recently entered California, marking its 14th and 15th acquisitions since its establishment. The company is set to exceed $7 billion in assets under management (AUM) with these latest acquisitions.
news.headline: Modern Wealth gains $1 billion in AUM with 2 California acquisitions, totaling 15 and aiming for $7 billion in AUM.

news.summary: Adhering to global manufacturing regulations has bolstered the company's standing in the U.S. defense industry.
news.headline: Maris-Tech completes pilot project in US, enhancing defense market position with international standards.

news.summary: In Portland, Oregon, and Hyderabad, India, on April 8, 2025, OptiMIM, a company under Form Technologies known for its expertise in advanced metal injection molding (MIM) solutions, has revealed a significant partnership with Vasantha Tool Crafts Pvt. Ltd. This joint venture is aimed at enhancing their market presence and capabilities.
news.headline: OptiMIM partners with Vasantha Tool Crafts Pvt.Ltd. to form "OptiMIM Global" for advanced MIM solutions globally.

news.summary: Since 2020, the total amount of donations exceeded $2.7 million. Today, Academy Sports + Outdoors ("Academy") (Nasdaq: ASO) revealed a donation exceeding $550,000 to St. Jude Children's Research Hospital® in KATY, Texas on April 8, 2025. This contribution signifies a significant commitment to supporting the hospital's invaluable work.
news.headline: Academy Sports + Outdoors donates $550K to St. Jude. Over $2.7M donated since 2020. Charity partnership thriving.

news.summary: Plug, a leading EV-exclusive wholesale online auction platform based in Santa Monica, California, has exceeded $15 million in sales of used electric vehicles, thanks to funding from a recently completed Seed Round. The market is currently seeing a rise in off-lease vehicles. The company is set to expand its operations following this significant milestone.
news.headline: Plug secures $6.7M in seed funding, launches EV-exclusive trade-in solution. Sold over $15M in used EVs.

news.summary: Blue Compass RV, a leading RV dealership in North America, has been named the preferred RV dealer of The Colorado Rockies baseball team. Based in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, Blue Compass RV is recognized as one of the fastest growing dealership groups in the region. The partnership was officially announced on April 8, 2025. This collaboration marks a significant milestone for Blue Compass RV as they enter the 2025 MLB season.
news.headline: Blue Compass RV partners with Colorado Rockies for 2025 MLB season. Fastest growing RV dealership in NA. [100 characters]

news.summary: On April 8, 2025, in Jericho, NY, J.S. Held, a global consulting firm, announced the promotion of hundreds of team members across various locations and specialties. The promotions reflect the company's dedication to upholding core values and providing exceptional expertise and client service.
news.headline: J.S. Held boosts expertise, promotes hundreds of team members, expands client base across geographies. #GrowthCelebration

news.summary: In San Francisco on April 8, 2025, it was reported that on March 12, 2025, shareholders of XP Inc. (NASDAQ: XP), a prominent technology-focused financial platform in Brazil offering affordable products and services, experienced a significant drop in share value exceeding 5%. This decline occurred following a certain event.
news.headline: Investors in XP Inc. (XP) saw shares decline over 5% after short seller alleged "Madoff-like" scheme.

news.summary: A significant development was revealed today in Miami with the announcement from Starboard Group regarding its strengthened partnership with TUI Cruises. This move signifies an expansion of Starboard's influence within the German market, indicating a notable strategic collaboration.
news.headline: Starboard Group expands partnership with TUI Cruises, to launch retail on second ship Mein Schiff Relax, enhancing German market presence.
Trump: I had great call with acting president of South Korea.
Trump: I spoke about tariffs with South Korea's acting president.

news.summary: A construction and engineering company, Conti Federal Services, has successfully renovated Maintenance Hangar Building #1643 at Naval Air Station Joint Reserve Base (NASJRB) in Fort Worth, Texas. This project, awarded by the United States Air Force, is a notable accomplishment for the 301st Fighter Wing. The renovation specifically benefits the transition of the wing from supporting the F16 Fighter Falcon. Conti Federal Services specializes in military and secure construction, operating globally in this sector. The completion of this renovation marks a significant milestone for the company in its commitment to serving defense infrastructure.
news.headline: Conti Federal finishes renovation of Maintenance Hangar #1643 at NASJRB Fort Worth, awarded by USAF for 301st Fighter Wing.

news.summary: The United States Department of Justice (DOJ) has decided to disband the National Cryptocurrency Enforcement Team (NCET), which was formed in October 2021 under President Joe Biden. The disbandment was mentioned in a memo by Deputy General Todd Blanche and is part of efforts to comply with former President Donald Trump's executive order on reshaping US crypto policy. The NCET was created to target platforms aiding criminals in laundering money and hiding their illegal proceeds. Blanche, who previously served as Trump's defense attorney, criticized the prior administration's strategy of regulation through prosecution. Despite Trump's pro-crypto stance during his campaign, conflicts of interest have been raised due to his involvement in various crypto projects like the World Liberty Financial decentralized finance (DeFi) protocol and the Trump memecoin. Concerns have also been raised about the potential impact of the World Liberty Financial stablecoin on bipartisan stablecoin legislation efforts in Congress.
news.headline: DOJ reportedly disbands National Cryptocurrency Enforcement Team in alignment with Trump's crypto policy; concerns raised over potential conflicts.

news.summary: On April 08, 2025, AccuStem Sciences, Inc. disclosed that the Chairman of the Board, Mr. Gabriele Cerrone, who is a part of a clinical stage diagnostics company focused on enhancing results for cancer patients, has informed the company about acquiring 152,802 more ACUT shares in the market. Consequently, his overall ownership now amounts to 4,872,759 shares.
news.headline: AccuStem Chairman buys 152,802 ACUT shares, raising total holding to 4,872,759 shares.

news.summary: In Cleveland, Lubrizol, a company focused on delivering sustainable solutions for mobility, well-being, and modern living, has recently published its newest Sustainability Report Update. Titled "Imagined by Life. Enabled by Science.™", the report showcases Lubrizol's progress through 2024 in key sustainability areas worldwide. These priorities include innovation for sustainable outcomes, promoting responsible citizenship, and fostering team involvement.
news.headline: Lubrizol releases 2024 Sustainability Report Update highlighting progress in innovation and sustainability.

news.summary: A recent national study conducted in the United States has uncovered a notable trend among consumers, showing a growing preference for voice commands over touch interactions when interacting with artificial intelligence (AI) technology. The study, which surveyed a significant number of participants across the country, highlights the increasing adoption of voice-based interactions in AI-driven systems. This shift signifies a notable change in consumer behavior towards more intuitive and convenient ways of engaging with AI technology.
news.headline: Study by Iris Flex shows U.S. consumers prefer voice over touch with AI; significant shift in interactions.

news.summary: Hero MotoCorp has recently revealed a significant partnership by appointing professional golfers Akshay Bhatia and Sahith Theegala as their global ambassadors for a duration of three years. This news was announced in New Delhi and Augusta, Georgia.
news.headline: Hero MotoCorp partners with golfers Akshay Bhatia and Sahith Theegala as global ambassadors for three years.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Kikoff, a credit-building platform with over a million users, unveiled AI Debt Negotiation, a voice AI agent set to launch for users in 2025. This tool aims to offer a more efficient and less stressful approach to managing debt. AI Debt Negotiation interacts with debt collectors for users, bargaining for favorable terms and frequently lowering the overall debt. This proprietary AI system seeks to empower users in handling their debt effectively.
news.headline: Kikoff introduces AI Debt Negotiation for consumers to address debt; aims to reduce amount owed; will launch in 2025.

news.summary: A recent study conducted in Austin, Texas shows that there is a significant issue of employee burnout that employers may be underestimating. The research highlights a concerning situation where a high percentage of employees are experiencing burnout, which in turn poses a serious threat to retention rates. Specifically, Care.com’s 2025 Future of Benefits Report, released today, indicates that 84% of employers acknowledge that burnout is having a notable impact on retention. However, there is a substantial difference in perception between employers and employees regarding the prevalence of burnout, with a 24-point gap. Employers estimate that 45% of their employees are experiencing burnout, highlighting the urgency for addressing this issue before it further impacts retention rates. Issues related to caregiving responsibilities are identified as a key factor contributing to the burnout crisis, emphasizing the need for organizations to develop strategies to support their employees' well-being.
news.headline: Care.com study in Austin finds 84% of employers note impact of burnout on retention, but 24% gap in employer-employee perception.

news.summary: In New York, Secure Properties, a prominent real estate investment firm focusing on net lease properties, has recently finalized the purchase of a 12-property portfolio encompassing Burger King establishments in Georgia and Alabama. The overall acquisition cost for the portfolio amounted to around $20 million. Situated strategically in bustling retail areas, all properties are fully leased to four tenants. Notably, eight of the locations are leased to independent operators while the remaining four are under corporate tenancy.
news.headline: Secure Properties acquires 12 Burger King sites in Georgia & Alabama for $20 million; properties 100% leased.

news.summary: In Chicago, Supplier.io, a prominent provider of supplier intelligence solutions, revealed that their supplier database has now exceeded 10 million suppliers and incorporates a tracked spend history of over $9 trillion. They offer over 350 million supplier data insights, enabling businesses to access comprehensive and reliable supplier intelligence. This extensive database equips procurement leaders with essential visibility to enhance their supply chain operations.
news.headline: Supplier.io now has over 10M suppliers and $9T spend data, providing 350M insights for enhanced supplier intelligence.

news.summary: In a recent development, CAVA (NYSE: CAVA), a renowned Mediterranean fast-casual restaurant brand, has launched its inaugural restaurant in South Florida, aiming to introduce a taste of the Mediterranean cuisine to the local community. The newly opened restaurant is situated in the Shoppes at Highland at 3645 West 84th Street, Unit 5, Hialeah, FL 33018. Operating hours are scheduled from 10:45 a.m. to 10:00 p.m. The CAVA Hialeah branch spans across 2,200 square feet and features a 40-seat dining area along with digital order pick-up and delivery services. The restaurant specializes in serving a variety of flavorful Mediterranean dishes.
news.headline: CAVA opens first South Florida restaurant in Hialeah, located at Shoppes at Highland. 2,200-square-foot location, 40-seat dining room. Open 10:45 a.m. - 10:00 p.m.

news.summary: Teddy Pornprinya, the co-founder and Chief Business Officer of Plume Network, discussed the potential future of tokenized real-world assets (RWAs) in an interview with Benzinga. He emphasized that the immediate focus should be on traditional financial instruments such as treasuries and private credit, noting the high liquidity and safety of these assets. Plume Network, a Layer 1 blockchain designed for RWAs, is playing a significant role in the space by offering a platform for tokenizing assets and utilizing DeFi tools. This approach, known as "RWA-Fi," allows users to purchase tokenized assets, use them as collateral in lending protocols, or trade them in automated market makers (AMMs). The platform aims to enhance the liquidity and utility of assets that were previously static, providing opportunities for individuals to earn real yield. Pornprinya highlighted the demand for assets like Apollo's private credit fund and the benefits of tokenizing real-world assets for broader market adoption. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Teddy Pornprinya, co-founder of Plume Network, sees treasuries and private credit as the key assets driving tokenization wave. Plume's blockchain platform enables users to tokenize assets, use them in DeFi protocols, and swap in AMMs.

news.summary: Phoenix-based company, Carvana Co. (NYSE: CVNA), known for its online platform for buying and selling used cars, revealed its intentions to establish a large-scale auction and reconditioning hub, termed 'Megasite', in Phoenix. This initiative is set to combine Carvana's Inspection and Reconditioning Center (IRC) functionalities with the current ADESA Phoenix wholesale auction site, allowing for both digital and in-lane auction activities to continue at the location. The integration aims to boost Carvana's production capacity and improve its overall operations.
news.headline: Carvana to integrate auction and reconditioning 'Megasite' in Phoenix, increasing production capacity.

news.summary: In Bellevue, Washington, Nintex, a prominent company specializing in AI-driven process automation and app development, revealed cutting-edge generative AI and natural language processing (NLP) features. These advancements allow users to create processes, workflows, forms, and custom integrations with essential business systems through basic language commands. This announcement enables mid-market firms and enterprise departments to adopt generative AI in their operations for the first time, enhancing efficiency and productivity.
news.headline: Nintex introduces new generative AI and NLP capabilities for business automation. Organizations can create processes and workflows with simple language prompts.

news.summary: In Edinburgh, Scotland and Sunnyvale, California, it was announced that the University of Edinburgh and Cerebras Systems have successfully installed and launched a revolutionary Cerebras CS-3 system cluster. This cluster, overseen by EPCC at the University and a part of the Edinburgh International Data Facility, comprises four CS-3s equipped with Cerebras's cutting-edge 3rd generation Wafer Scale Engine processors. These processors are touted as the world's largest commercially available.
news.headline: University of Edinburgh partners with Cerebras to install 4 CS-3 systems, boosting UK AI research capabilities.

news.summary: Expanding their collaboration with AERIN, Williams Sonoma, Williams Sonoma Home, Pottery Barn Kids, and Pottery Barn Teen have announced a new partnership. This move signifies a strategic growth opportunity for the brands involved. AERIN, a renowned lifestyle brand, brings its expertise to the table in this venture. The collaboration aims to capitalize on market trends and consumer preferences, with a focus on expanding product offerings. This partnership reflects the brands' commitment to innovative strategies and enhancing their product lines. The collaboration is expected to drive increased sales and brand visibility for all parties involved.
news.headline: Williams Sonoma, Williams Sonoma Home, Pottery Barn Kids, and Pottery Barn Teen are expanding collaboration with AERIN.

news.summary: In Sunnyvale, California, Yugabyte, known for their distributed database solutions, revealed their new agentic AI app, Performance Advisor for YugabyteDB Aeon, a software-as-a-service (SaaS) product. This was unveiled before Google Cloud NEXT. Additionally, they introduced an adaptable indexing framework aimed at integrating cutting-edge vector indexing tools and algorithms to enhance the features provided by pgvector. This move includes infusing AI into their offerings.
news.headline: YugabyteDB introduces AI app and vector search for deploying AI at scale, including Performance Advisor for YugabyteDB Aeon.

news.summary: A company based in Scottsdale, Arizona called Starday, known for its AI-driven food innovation, has recently secured $11 million in Series A funding. The funding will be used to speed up retail expansion and establish unique partnerships with retailers and consumer packaged goods (CPG) companies for developing custom products. This funding round was primarily backed by Slow Ventures and Equal Ventures, with $8 million in equity and an additional $3 million in a debt credit facility from Silicon Valley Bank. Additionally, a significant investment from prominent global food entities was also included in the funding.
news.headline: Starday secures $11M in Series A funding to expand data-informed food innovation and retail partnerships.

news.summary: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida, iBusiness Funding (iBF), a division of Ready Capital Corporation (NYSE: RC), has introduced Lendsey AI, the first of its kind agentic AI platform tailored for small and medium-sized business (SMB) lending. This technology pioneer in business banking also disclosed a commitment of $100 million for the progress and incorporation of AI throughout its platform. This initiative signifies a significant shift in how small businesses can obtain capital, heralding a new era in SMB lending technology.
news.headline: iBusiness Funding launches Lendsey AI for SMB lending, with $100 million commitment to AI integration.

news.summary: Amazon.com Inc (NASDAQ: AMZN) has launched Amazon Nova Sonic, a groundbreaking foundation model that merges speech understanding and generation into one model to enhance human-like voice interactions in AI applications. The model can be accessed through Amazon Bedrock using a new bi-directional streaming API, streamlining the creation of voice applications like customer service call automation and AI agents in various industries. This innovation marks a significant advancement in AI technology.
news.headline: Amazon introduces Amazon Nova Sonic, merging speech understanding and generation into 1 model for AI apps.

news.summary: ROCHESTER, Minn., - (BUSINESS WIRE) - (plated)™ Skin Science is introducing National Exosome Day on April 8, 2025, to celebrate the pioneering progress in skin science. This event aims to highlight the significance of exosome technology in enhancing skin and hair health. Exosomes, minute extracellular vesicles containing potent elements such as phosphopeptides and antioxidants, play a vital role in nourishing the skin. By shedding light on this innovative technology, the day seeks to promote awareness about the benefits of exosomes for achieving more vibrant and healthier skin.
news.headline: (plated)™ Skin Science introduces National Exosome Day on April 8, 2025. Celebrating exosome technology in aesthetics for healthier skin and hair.

news.summary: In Cleveland, the renowned digital trust company Keyfactor revealed that its Keyfactor Command Certificate Lifecycle Automation as a Service (CLAaaS) has been granted "In Process" status by the Federal Risk and Authorization Management Program (FedRAMP®) and is accessible on the FedRAMP Marketplace. This achievement positions Keyfactor as the inaugural Certificate Lifecycle Management (CLM) provider to acquire this recognition. This step stands as a noteworthy advancement in delivering CLM solutions.
news.headline: Keyfactor's CLAaaS achieves "In Process" status from FedRAMP, becoming first CLM vendor to do so. Characters: 97

news.summary: In Puerto Rico, Gulp Data, a prominent company in data valuation and collateralization, has projected that the market comparable worth of 23andMe's data holdings stands at an estimated $289 million. This evaluation arises amidst growing apprehensions regarding the future of the firm's expansive genetic repository due to its financial challenges. Recognized for its advancements in consumer genetic analysis, 23andMe has curated a substantial database comprising crucial genomic and health data. Recent sources emphasize the precarious situation surrounding the safeguarding of this valuable asset.
news.headline: Gulp Data values 23andMe's data assets at $289 million amid bankruptcy concerns.

news.summary: In Karachi, Pakistan, Haball, a prominent fintech company specializing in supply chain financing and payments, has successfully raised a significant pre-Series A funding round totaling US$52 million. This funding includes a US$5 million equity investment led by Zayn VC, a renowned venture capital firm in Pakistan. Additionally, the round also saw strategic financing allocations from Majlis Advisory SPV, private investors in KSA, angel investors, and a notable business conglomerate. This investment marks a significant milestone for Haball and signifies growing confidence in the company within the industry.
news.headline: Haball, a Pakistan-based fintech company, secures a US$52 million funding round, with US$5 million in equity from Zayn VC.

news.summary: RCI Hospitality Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: RICK) announced their club and restaurant sales for the fiscal second quarter that ended on March 31, 2025. The reported sales exclude non-core operations and are pending final closing. The company anticipates releasing the full financial results for Q2 2025 by May 12, 2025. In light of adverse weather conditions in January and February, 18 clubs and Bombshells were forced to shut down for 1-2 days each. Even those that remained open experienced a decline in business. Eric Langan, President & CEO of RCI, provided this information.
news.headline: RCI reports 2Q25 club and restaurant sales for fiscal quarter ended March 31, 2025. 18 clubs and Bombshells closed 1-2 days due to bad weather. CEO expects full financial results by May 12, 2025.

news.summary: Les Mains Bleues, a leading denim supply chain solutions provider, based in Singapore, introduced their latest software innovation, Trend Engine+. This exclusive tool aims to revolutionize the industry by offering advanced features for enhancing supply chain efficiency and performance on a global scale.
news.headline: Global denim supply chain provider Les Mains Bleues launches Trend Engine+, an AI-powered market intelligence tool for brands.
